debug.description: Cheapest possible models for pipeline validation only (not for output quality)

testing.description: Good balance for fast iteration and testing with reasonable quality

budget.description: Good balance of quality and cost for production use. First-frame continuity via Kling O1 Standard.
budget.video_duration_notes: Only 5s or 10s accepted when using start_image_url

quality.description: Best character consistency and Pixar-quality output. Uses Kling v3 for multi-prompt/element control.
quality.video_duration_notes: Only 5s or 10s when using start_image_url. 3-10s without start_image_url.

safety_notes.nano-banana: safety_tolerance ranges 1 (strictest) to 6 (most permissive). We use 6. However, the internal Gemini safety guardrails can still block prompts involving: violence, injury, fear/panic of minors, abandonment, crying children. If blocked, rewrite prompt to use positive framing (e.g. 'looking around with wonder' instead of 'lost and scared').
safety_notes.gpt-image: No configurable safety parameter. OpenAI's internal content policy applies. Prompts involving minors in distress may be blocked. Use neutral/positive framing.
safety_notes.seedream: enable_safety_checker: false disables the external checker. Internal model guardrails may still apply.
safety_notes.seedance: No configurable safety parameter. Handles most story content without issues.
safety_notes.kling: No safety parameter exposed. Handles most story content without issues. The cfg_scale parameter (0.5) gives models more creative freedom vs strict prompt adherence.
safety_notes.grok: No configurable safety parameter. Internal xAI guardrails apply.

ara.description: Warm, friendly — best for emotional stories, gentle narration

eve.description: Energetic, upbeat — best for exciting adventures, playful tales

sal.description: Smooth, balanced — best for neutral narration, calm stories

music.auto_prompt_template: instrumental {mood} {style}, {atmosphere}, no vocals, cinematic Pixar soundtrack style, acoustic

debug.description: Grok Imagine — variable duration, no frame continuity

budget.description: Kling O1 Standard — 5s or 10s, start_image_url for continuity

quality.first_frame_notes: Kling O1 start_image_url = style reference only. For strict frame-to-frame continuity, use Wan FLF2V (both start+end frames, fixed 5s, \$0.40 flat).

cinematic.description: Seedance 2.0 Fast — 4-15s, first/last frame, native audio

kling_2.5_turbo.pitfalls: Prompt field was missing in early calls — must pass motion-only prompt alongside image_url

wan_flf2v.pitfalls: Both start AND end frame images are mandatory — passing only one returns 'Field required' for end_image_url. Duration param is silently ignored — always produces 5s output. Best for short seamless transitions between two key frames.

kling_o1.pitfalls: start_image_url is a CHARACTER/STYLE REFERENCE, NOT a strict first frame. The generated video does NOT start from the exact input image — it uses it for identity cues. For true frame-to-frame continuity, use Wan FLF2V instead. Using image_url (not start_image_url) returns 'Field required'.

grok_imagine_video.pitfalls: Prompt is required even for image-to-video. Missing prompt returns 'Field required'. No start_image_url support.

seedance_2.0.pitfalls: Duration is string ('5' not 5). Missing prompt returns 'Field required'.

wan_flf2v.pitfalls: Both start AND end frame images are mandatory — passing only one returns 'Field required' for end_image_url.

xai_tts.pitfalls: Using 'input' field instead of 'text' returns 'Field required'. Always use 'text'.

nano_banana_2.safety: safety_tolerance must be string '6' not integer 6
nano_banana_2.pitfalls: Integer 6 is rejected. Use '6' (string). limit_generations: true recommended.

mp3_concat.pitfalls: FFmpeg concat demuxer with -c copy produces silent/corrupt MP3 files due to timestamp drift. Must use filter_complex concat with re-encode.
